commit_message: [HDL] Modularizing merges and generalizing their implementation {.v,.vhd}  [HDL] Modularizing merges and generalizing their implementation {.v,.vhd}  The previous implementation of the `merge` component (all variants of a `merge` along with a `cmerge`) was not sufficiently general and failed to function correctly when more than one input received a token in the same cycle. Specifically, the issue stemmed from the way the `ins_ready` vector was calculated, which could result in data loss if multi
